journey.name: Edit a Mood
journey.description: Create a mood record and then edit it from history

actions.action: Tap on the Add floating action button
Verify that the Add/Edit Mood screen opens
Type in the Notes text field 'Initial note for editing'
Tap on the History toolbar icon
Tap on the mood entry with 'Initial note for editing'
Verify that the Add/Edit Mood screen opens
Type in the Notes text field ' - updated'
Verify that the mood entry in history now contains 'Initial note for editing - updated'
